text: GLP-1s appear to protect against cancer. Researchers are trying to figure out how - NPR
fullText: Recent studies suggest the weight loss and diabetes drugs may prevent cancer and slow its progression. While weight loss is known to curb cancer risks, GLP-1s may act on other brain and metabolic pathways to prevent cancer.

text: Conflicts on rise globally, highest level since WWII, data shows - NPR
fullText: Global conflicts surged to the highest number tallied by Uppsala Conflict Data Program. Fatalities were the highest on record since 1994, with approximately 244,600 people killed in conflict in 2025.
